_note: Synthetic fixture. No PHI, no real hp.* rows, all values fabricated. Fail side of the progressive-sequencing pair; same structured_output as sequencing-pass.json, method and caveats front-loaded so the finding is buried.

structured_output.effect: 3 of 30 logged nights showed elevated resting heart rate

narration: Over 30 nights, after estimating 12% of the missing readings and computing a 95% confidence interval of 0.1 to 0.4 at p=0.03 with the result still marked provisional, your resting heart rate was higher on 3 of them.
